rationale: Both evaluations reach the same conclusion for the same job-relevant reason: the candidate lacks the required Java/Kotlin/JVM and enterprise framework (Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus) expertise, with recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang. The 1-point score difference (3 vs 4) and the reworded strengths/concerns are within ordinary run-to-run noise. Notably the score did not drop for the Lagos variant, and no concern, strength, or piece of reasoning keys off the country change.
